title: Robinhood Launches 'AI-Native' Ethereum Layer-2 Network, Tokenized Stock Trading
summary: Robinhood opened the public mainnet for its Arbitrum-powered Ethereum layer-2 network on Wednesday, enabling tokenized stock trading. The network is described as 'AI-native' and aims to bridge traditional finance and crypto.
body:
Robinhood has opened the public mainnet for its Ethereum layer-2 network powered by Arbitrum. The network, described as 'AI-native,' supports tokenized stock trading, allowing users to trade traditional stocks as crypto tokens on the blockchain.

The platform is designed to make stock trading more accessible and integrate traditional finance with decentralized finance (DeFi). Robinhood's layer-2 network leverages Arbitrum's scalability and low transaction costs, making it an attractive option for both crypto and traditional investors.

This launch could democratize stock trading by lowering barriers to entry, such as high fees and complex interfaces. By tokenizing stocks, Robinhood enables fractional ownership and easier transferability, potentially attracting a broader audience to the crypto space.

Users interested in tokenized stock trading can now explore Robinhood's layer-2 network. Keep an eye on the platform's adoption rates and any regulatory developments that might impact tokenized asset trading. Read more → https://decrypt.co/372614/robinhood-ai-native-ethereum-layer-2-network-tokenized-stock-trading
twitterThread: Robinhood just opened the public mainnet for its 'AI-native' Ethereum layer-2 network with tokenized stock trading. Traditional finance meets crypto, and it's live now. 🚀
The network, powered by Arbitrum, allows trading stocks as crypto tokens. Lower fees, fractional ownership, and seamless transfers. A big step for DeFi and traditional finance integration.

If you're into crypto or stocks, this is worth checking out. Tokenized stocks could make trading more accessible. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-01-robinhood-launches-ethereum-layer-2-network-with-tokenized-stocks
standaloneTweet: Robinhood's new 'AI-native' Ethereum layer-2 network lets you trade tokenized stocks. Lower fees, fractional ownership, and a bridge between traditional finance and crypto. 💎
